description.value:
his snare hides a tiny humanoid figurine made of enchanted ice among leaves or just beneath a thin layer of dirt in the square. The first creature to enter the snare's square crushes the statuette, releasing an incorporeal figure of chilly mist that grabs at the triggering creature, dealing @Damage[8d8[cold]] damage. The creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:26] save.

Critical Success The creature takes no damage.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round as the icy figure clings to its legs.

Failure The creature takes full damage and @Damage[1d6[persistent,cold]] damage from the icy figure's embrace. It is clumsy 1 for as long as it takes this persistent damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and @Damage[2d6[persistent,cold]] damage from the icy figure's embrace. It is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} for as long as it takes this persistent damage.
